ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the course */,
  "contact_periods" INTEGER /* Total contact periods for the course */,
  "lecture_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lecture hours */,
  "tutorial_hours" INTEGER /* Number of tutorial hours */,
  "practical_hours" INTEGER /* Number of practical hours */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Description of the prerequisites */,
  "co_requisite_description" TEXT /* Description of the co-requisites */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prerequisite relationship */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the prerequisite is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_requisites" (
  "co_requisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a co-requisite */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the co-requisite relationship */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the co-requisite is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the co-requisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the co-requisite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_requisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_requisites_co_requisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_requisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_requisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class or lab */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class or lab */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the class or lab is held */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., Lecture, Tutorial, Practical) */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the schedule is cancelled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the classroom is currently available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the instructor is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "admission_year" TEXT /* Year of admission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
